name: Metalfrio Solutions S.A.
summary: Metalfrio Solutions S.A. manufactures, imports, exports, and sells domestic and commercial refrigerators and freezers in Brazil and internationally. It provides chest and vertical freezers, refrigerators, and brewers, as well as beer maxx equipment under the Metalfrio, Klimasan, Caravell, and Derby brands. The company also offers maintenance and technical assistance services for the products sold by third parties, full-service equipment rental services, and logistic services; and sells parts to authorized service stations and to customers. It serves beverage manufacturers, frozen and frozen foods, and food service and convenience stores. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
